data.current_summary: Post an appointment into a valid diary allocation

The appointment is immediately added to the diary system and visible to staff.

data.current_summary: Cancel an existing appointment using its unique identifier
data.description_suggestion: Cancels an existing diary appointment identified by its unique ID. Requires the branch short name and appointment ID as parameters. The appointment status is changed to cancelled but the record remains in the system for audit purposes. Returns a 200 status on successful cancellation. Unlike deletion, cancellation preserves the appointment history. The cancelled slot may become available for rebooking depending on system configuration.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing entirely.
